items.title: A near-autonomous AI chemist improves a challenging reaction in medicinal chemistry
items.original_summary: OpenAI and Molecule.one show how a near-autonomous AI chemist using GPT-5.4 improved a key drug-making reaction, advancing medicinal chemistry research.
items.chinese_summary: OpenAI 联合 Molecule.one 用 GPT-5.4 跑了个近自主 AI 化学家,优化了一个药物合成反应。这是研究类成果,不是新 API。后端工程师基本可以略过,除非你在做药物研发管线。
items.backend_focus: 无直接后端影响。包装大于实质,纯科研宣传,不涉及 SDK、API 或基础设施变更。

items.title: Introducing LifeSciBench
items.original_summary: Introducing LifeSciBench, an expert-authored, expert-reviewed benchmark for evaluating how AI systems handle real-world life science research tasks and decisions.
items.chinese_summary: OpenAI 发布 LifeSciBench 基准测试,用来评估 AI 在生命科学研究任务上的表现。这是给评测团队用的,后端服务开发不直接相关。
items.backend_focus: 无 API 变更。如果你做 LLM 评测管线可拿来对比模型在生物领域的能力,否则跳过。

items.title: Predicting model behavior before release by simulating deployment
items.original_summary: OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data to improve safety and evaluation accuracy.
items.chinese_summary: OpenAI 公开 Deployment Simulation 方法,用真实对话数据在模型发布前预测行为。这是内部安全评估方法论文,不是产品更新。
items.backend_focus: 无 SDK/API 影响。可作为风险参考:未来模型变更前 OpenAI 会做更充分评估,你的 prompt 对新模型行为可能更可预测。

items.title: Introducing the OpenAI Partner Network
items.original_summary: OpenAI launches the Partner Network, investing $150M to help global partners accelerate enterprise AI adoption, deployment, and transformation.
items.chinese_summary: OpenAI 推出 Partner Network,投 1.5 亿美元拉集成商帮企业落地 AI。这是渠道营销动作,不是技术更新。
items.backend_focus: 包装大于实质。不影响现有 API 或 SDK。后续企业客户可能通过该网络采购,你的对接流程不变。

items.title: New OpenAI Academy courses for the next era of work
items.original_summary: OpenAI introduces three Academy courses that help people build practical AI skills, create repeatable workflows, and apply agents in everyday work.
items.chinese_summary: OpenAI Academy 上线三门新课,教人用 AI 做工作流和 Agent。纯培训内容,跟后端工程完全无关。
items.backend_focus: 无技术影响。包装大于实质,适合给非技术同事看,工程师跳过。

items.title: How Preply combines AI and human tutors to personalize learning
items.original_summary: Preply uses OpenAI to launch AI-generated lesson summaries, providing personalised feedback and language learning exercises.
items.chinese_summary: Preply 用 OpenAI 生成课程摘要的故事,客户案例文章。没有新 API、没有新模型,纯品牌推广。
items.backend_focus: 包装大于实质。无 SDK/配置变更,无法据此优化后端。

items.title: OpenAI to acquire Ona
items.original_summary: OpenAI plans to acquire Ona to expand Codex with secure, persistent cloud environments, enabling long-running AI agents across enterprise workflows.
items.chinese_summary: OpenAI 宣布收购 Ona,把它的安全持久云环境集成进 Codex,让 Agent 能跑长时间任务。值得关注,直接影响 Agent 基础设施方向。
items.backend_focus: 短期无 API 变更。中长期意味着 Codex Agent 会获得持久化沙箱环境,做长任务编排的后端可关注后续 SDK 更新。

items.title: BBVA puts AI at the core of banking with OpenAI
items.original_summary: Learn how BBVA scaled ChatGPT Enterprise to 100,000 employees and partnered with OpenAI to accelerate AI-powered banking transformation worldwide.
items.chinese_summary: BBVA 把 ChatGPT Enterprise 推到 10 万员工的案例分享。纯客户故事,后端工程无新东西。
items.backend_focus: 包装大于实质。无技术细节,无 API/集成变化,工程师无需阅读。

items.title: How an astrophysicist uses Codex to help simulate black holes
items.original_summary: Discover how astrophysicist Chi-kwan Chan uses Codex to build black hole simulations, helping scientists study extreme physics and test Einstein’s theory of general relativity.
items.chinese_summary: 天体物理学家用 Codex 模拟黑洞的故事。应用案例,不是产品更新。
items.backend_focus: 包装大于实质。无 SDK/功能更新,仅展示 Codex 在科研场景的使用方式。

items.title: Supporting Europe’s work in ensuring a trustworthy AI ecosystem
items.original_summary: OpenAI supports the EU Code of Practice on AI content transparency, advancing provenance standards and tools to help people understand AI-generated content.
items.chinese_summary: OpenAI 声明支持欧盟 AI 内容透明性 Code of Practice,推进内容溯源标准。如果你面向欧盟用户的内容涉及 AI 生成,这跟你相关。
items.backend_focus: 关注后续 C2PA 水印 API 可能成为合规要求。做欧盟业务的图片/视频生成管线需提前规划内容溯源标记。
